parameters.title: abriTAMR Parameters
parameters.description: A NATA accredited tool for reporting the presence of antimicrobial resistance genes

abritamr_identity.title: Identity threshold for gene matching
abritamr_identity.description: Minimum percent identity for gene matching

abritamr_species.title: Species to use for resistance gene detection
abritamr_species.description: Species name for species-specific resistance gene detection
